g.text: Node increments on seeing own SUSPECT
ALIVE with inc > SUSPECT.inc clears suspicion
Node B: {B: ALIVE, incarnation: 5} ← sees own suspicion

text.tspan: Node B: {B: ALIVE, incarnation: 5} ← sees own suspicion

g.text: Node A: {B: ALIVE, incarnation: 6} ← accepted higher incarnation
Node B: {B: ALIVE, incarnation: 6} ← incremented and broadcast
Node C: {B: ALIVE, incarnation: 6} ← accepted higher incarnation

text.tspan: Node A: {B: ALIVE, incarnation: 6} ← accepted higher incarnation
Node B: {B: ALIVE, incarnation: 6} ← incremented and broadcast
Node C: {B: ALIVE, incarnation: 6} ← accepted higher incarnation
